author: Clement Tham
name: 11L LeakyTTT 16h Local RTX 4060 Ti
blurb: Unlimited-compute local run on a single RTX 4060 Ti using an 11-layer LeakyReLU^2 + Parallel Muon + XSA4 + Partial RoPE + LN scale + EMA + legal score-first TTT stack. Timed training stopped at 7,998 steps after 16 hours; final legal_ttt_exact reached 1.15377788 val_bpb under the 16,000,000-byte artifact cap.
notes: Sliding-window int6 eval reached 1.15520389 val_bpb; final legal_ttt_exact reached 1.15377788.
